title: Anarchy Modpack
description: A Modpack designed for servers like 2b2t.
body:
# Anarchy Modpack

Currently for version 1.20.4

**A Modpack Designed for Anarchy Servers like 2b2t.org**

Designed to be lightweight, performant, and compatible with as many utility mods as possible. It also aims to help make Anarchy travel and building easier. The only version this modpack will support is the version that 2b2t.org is actively on.

**Disclaimer**

Some mods could be disallowed by other servers or flag anti-cheats, like viafabric. Use it at your own risk and always read the rules of the server you are playing.

## Support

Join our [discord](https://modrinth.com) for support, suggestions, or questions.

## Credit

I will try my best to credit as many people as possible, if you aren't credited contact me on discord through the username "unfidelity". If you do not want your mod added you can contact me there aswell.

Credit to:

[jellysquid](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) for Sodium

[rfresh2](https://modrinth.com/user/rfresh2) for XaeroPlus

[coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) and the rest of the Iris team

[flashyreese](https://modrinth.com/user/FlashyReese) for Sodium Extra and Sodium Plus
